CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-17-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Motion To Set Aside Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Craig K. Martin, Esq., appearing for plaintiff and moving party.
Plaintiff's Motion to Set Aside Sanctions issued on 8/14/2002 to Craig K. Martin, Esq., in the amount of $250.00, is heard this day. Court ordered moiton granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Jo Ann Bryce, CSR #3321. (212)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on regular calendar this day for Mandatory Settlement Conference. Craig Martin, Esq. for Plaintiff and Todd Peterson, Esq, for Defendant. Court and counsel confer in chambers. Case failed to settle. Trial date confirmed.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Each counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Mary J. Hinds. (212)
